name: Polyfill.io CDN Hijack (North Korea linked)
description: cdn.polyfill.io domain acquired by malicious actor (Funnull/North Korea linked), injecting malware into 380K+ websites via CDN script tags. Not an npm package but affects any site loading scripts from polyfill.io.

affected_packages.name: polyfill.io
affected_packages.note: This is a CDN domain compromise, not an npm package. Check HTML/templates for script tags loading from cdn.polyfill.io or polyfill.io

c2_servers.note: Fake Google Analytics domain used for redirects

remediation: Remove ALL script tags loading from polyfill.io or cdn.polyfill.io
Or replace with Fastly mirror: https://polyfill-fastly.io/
Search codebase: grep -r 'polyfill.io' in HTML, templates, and JS files
Check CSP headers and update allowed domains
